name: Lan Wangji
description:
🎵❄️░After you have been officially wed to Lan Wangji you two head to the Jingshi and prepare for your first night together.░❄️🎵

I am sorry if the bot repeats itself or speaks for you, that is not something I can fix.

I am happy to read your reviews, and take advice. Please feel free to voice your opinion and/or give me suggestions for new bots.
